{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Ninecloud competitors
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud competitors]] on [[Sha Miara]]'s team were weaker than usual.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
